title: Marbella Luxury Motor Yacht Rental Weekend Costs & Guide 2026
html:
For a weekend of opulence on the Mediterranean, chartering a luxury motor yacht from Marbella offers a five-star escape on the water. Prices for a crewed 15-metre motor yacht start from approximately 6,500 EUR for two days, with departures from Puerto Deportivo de Marbella. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own.

Where to set off in Marbella

Marbella's coastline is dotted with luxury marinas and sheltered bays. The main departure point is Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, a full-service marina in the town centre. Nearby, Puerto Banús is famous for its superyacht berths and designer boutiques. For a quieter start, consider Cabopino Marina to the east, which gives quick access to the dunes of Artola. Westward, the port of Estepona offers an alternative gateway, while the Bay of Marbella itself provides a calm stretch for shakedown cruises. Heading south, the island of Gibraltar is roughly 40 nautical miles away, a popular day-trip destination.

How much does it cost to rent a luxury motor yacht in Marbella for a weekend?

A weekend charter for a 15-metre motor yacht typically costs between 6,000 and 12,000 EUR.

Prices vary by boat size, age, and included services. A half-day smaller motorboat rental, such as an Axopar 28, starts from 1,200 EUR for four hours. For a full-day catamaran experience, expect from 2,500 EUR for a Lagoon 40. A crewed Sunseeker 60 with a skipper and host can cost from 10,000 EUR for a full weekend, including fuel and VAT. To compare verified listings and pricing, you can book a boat online through the platform.

  • Shared group tour: from 150 EUR per person for a half-day
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): from 1,200 EUR for an Axopar 28
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): from 2,500 EUR for a Lagoon 40
  • Crewed motor yacht weekend (2 days): from 6,500 EUR for a Prestige 500

Which boat to rent

  1. Sunseeker 60, Ideal for a group of 10 to 12 guests; from 12,000 EUR for a weekend
  2. Prestige 500, Suitable for 8 guests with full crew; from 8,500 EUR for two days. Those interested can browse the Prestige 500 for hire on BoatHire24.
  3. Azimut 72, Perfect for 10 guests; from 15,000 EUR for a weekend
  4. Axopar 28, Best for a fast day trip for 6 guests; from 1,200 EUR for half a day

Do you need a licence to rent a luxury motor yacht in Marbella?

For motor yachts over 15 metres, a local licence is generally required for bareboat charters, but crewed charters include a licensed skipper.

The operator will confirm exact requirements, but typically in Spain the Patrón de Yate licence is needed for vessels over 15 metres and more than 5 nautical miles from shore. If you book a crewed yacht, the skipper holds the licence, so your party is not required to have one. This makes crewed charters the simplest option for a weekend.

In summer, the Levante wind can pick up in the afternoon, so morning departures offer the calmest conditions for cruising west towards Estepona.

When is the best season to rent a motor yacht in Marbella?

The high season runs from June to September, with the best weather in July and August.

During these months, water temperatures reach 25°C and the sea is typically calm. However, the Levante wind can occasionally blow in summer, causing choppy seas in the Strait of Gibraltar area. Spring (April and May) and autumn (October) offer milder conditions and lower prices. In 2026, Easter falls in early April, which marks the start of the shoulder season with good availability.

At a glance

  • Price band: 1,200, 15,000 EUR for a weekend
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: half-day to 2 days
  • Guest capacity: 6 to 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I rent a luxury motor yacht in Marbella without a licence?

Yes, you can rent a crewed yacht where a skipper and crew are included, so no licence is needed from your side.

What is the cancellation policy for weekend charters in Marbella?

Most operators offer a full refund if you cancel at least 30 days before departure, but check the specific listing on BoatHire24 for details.

Is fuel included in the price of a motor yacht rental?

Fuel is sometimes included for longer charters, but usually it is billed separately based on hours run; confirm with the charter company.

How far in advance should I book a weekend motor yacht in Marbella?

For peak summer weekends, booking at least two months ahead is recommended to secure your preferred boat and slot.

To understand the simple booking process, first read how boat rental works on the platform. Then browse available yachts and message owners directly to confirm availability in 2026.

Reviewing your options with BoatHire24 gives you access to a fleet of verified motor yachts in Marbella, from agile Axopars to full-crew Azimuts. If you own a boat, you can check availability to list on the marketplace and earn income from your vessel.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
